title: Fresh Croatian Trout Salad
description: A light, umamirich salad featuring grilled trout, fresh greens, and a spicy chilliasparagus sauce, perfect for a date night.

ingredients.name: homemade chilli sauce
ingredients.notes: blend 1 chili, 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp honey, 1 tsp vinegar, pinch salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 150 °C (300 °F). Brush trout fillets with 1 tbsp olive oil, season with salt, pepper, and smoked paprika, and bake for 12–14 minutes or until internal temperature reaches 60 °C. Let rest 5 minutes.
While trout cooks, toss salad greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, capers, lemon juice, remaining olive oil, dill, and soy sauce in a large bowl until evenly coated.
Whisk chilli sauce with a splash of water to thin if needed.
Flake the slightly cooled trout into the salad bowl and drizzle with the chilli sauce.
Gently fold the fish into the greens, ensuring an even distribution.
Season with additional salt, pepper, or dill to taste.
Serve immediately, optionally with a wedge of lemon for extra brightness.
